case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. HUGH CHARLES JR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $110.99) SERVED FEB-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES JR, HUGH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARLES JR, HUGH $1,996.14 PRINCIPAL, $110.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,107.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
